steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The word 'instead' signals a contrast: most studies focus on people above sea level, but these researchers chose to study people below sea level. The blank must describe an approach that goes against standard practice.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "predictable": implies routine practice — the opposite of what 'instead' signals. ✗
  • "timeworn": means old and conventional — contradicts the researchers' unconventional choice. ✗
  • "innovative": means new and unconventional — exactly fits researchers who pursued the opposite of standard methodology. ✓
  • "idealistic": refers to motivation or attitude, not methodology — doesn't capture the contrast the passage draws. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
